---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement to the research workflow, scoring, outputs, or developer ergonomics
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem to solve
What workflow pain point or limitation are you trying to address?

## Proposed change
Describe the change you want.

## Why it matters
How would this improve the project?

## Scope
- [ ] Quant factors / model evaluation
- [ ] Announcement ingestion
- [ ] Event classification / summarization
- [ ] Priority / risk ranking
- [ ] Watchlists / archive timeline
- [ ] Dashboard UX
- [ ] Documentation / developer workflow
- [ ] CI / repository tooling

## Suggested implementation ideas
Optional, but useful if you already have a direction in mind.

## Alternatives considered
What else did you consider?

## Additional context
Links, examples, or references.
